node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"հարստու<lb xml:id=\"l104229694\" facs=\"#z104229694\" n=\"15\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>թենէ","line":{"facs":"#z104229693","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104229693","n":"14"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-014a"},"n":"հարստութենէ"},"V1294":{"lit":"հարստութենէ","line":{"facs":"#z104423601","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104423601","n":"9"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9094 copy"},"n":"հարստութենէ"},"M8076":{"lit":"հարստութենէ","context":"text/body/ab[41]","n":"հարստութենէ"},"M695":{"lit":"հարս<lb xml:id=\"l103912673\" facs=\"#z103912673\" n=\"7\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>տութենէ","line":{"facs":"#z103912672","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103912672","n":"6"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-286b"},"n":"հարստութենէ"},"M6712":{"lit":"հարստութենէ","line":{"facs":"#z104385263","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104385263","n":"3"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-123b"},"n":"հարստութենէ"},"M7227":{"lit":"հար<lb xml:id=\"l103958468\" facs=\"#z103958468\" n=\"7\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ստութենէ","line":{"facs":"#z103958469","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103958469","n":"6"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-015a"},"n":"հարստութենէ"}}
